reviews.comment:
Buena atención  pero dos playeros para mil autos. Larga espera todos los días. Una tortura. Hay surtidores para 4 playeros tranquilamente.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but two pumps for a thousand cars. Long waits every day. Torturous. There are pumps for four pumps easily.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwb3BfVmRREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Imposible creer que solo hay una persona que atiende en la distribución de combustible. Se entiende porque no hay inversión turismo en la zona.

(Translated by Google)
It's impossible to believe there's only one person working in fuel distribution. It's understandable why there's no tourism investment in the area.
